upasarga_meanings.meaning: icCA karanA svIkAra karanA praSaMsA karanA

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'samaBinandito mantriBiH' (kaTA0 21148) pratinanditaH=varDitaH=saBAjitaH
'sA tatra pUjyamAnA vE damayantI vyanandata' (BA0 vana0 6576) vyanandata=prAsIdat prAhfzyat
'(daRqaH) yaTASAstraM prayuktaH san sadevAsuramAnavam jagadAnandayet sarvamanyaTA tat prakopayet' (yAjYa0 1355)..
'dEvahatA bahubudDayo vinaSyanti svalpaDiyopi viDirakzitA aBinandanti' (paYcata0 ) aBinandanti smfDyanti
'ripuM nihatyABinananda vE tadA hyalambuzaM pakvamalambuzaM yaTA' (BA0 droRa0 10936).. aBinananda jaharza
'aBinandanti BUtAni vinASe pApakarmaRaH' (rA0 52113) nandanti prasIdantItyarTaH
'nABinandanti kelikalAH' (mAlatI0 3) kelikalAsu na ramanta ityarTaH
'AtmaviqambanAmaBinandanti' (kAda0) viqambanayA tuzyanti tAM rocayante
'ataste vaco nABinandAmi' (SA0 2) na rocaye nedamaBimataM mametyarTaH
'nABinandeta maraRaM nABinandeta jIvitam' (manu0 645) aBinandeta=aBinandet icCet noBayena pratihfzyet uBayatrodAsitaH syAdityarTaH
'acintyaM SIlaguptAnAM caritraM kulayozitAm iti cABinanandustAmupakoSAM saBAsadaH' (kaTA0 483).. aBinananduH praSaSaMsuH SaSlAGire sADvityavadan
'tato'ByagacCat sahasA mandapAlopi BArata aTa te sarva evEnaM nAByanandaMstadA sutAH' (BA0 Adi0 23320).. nAByanandan nAnvamodanta na mudA pratyagfhRan
'hInANgaM pfTivIpAlaM nABinandanti devatAH' (BA0 u0 14925) tatra tallakzaRe rAjYi na prasIdantItyAha
'varzopavarzO tad budDvA sADvIM tAmaByanandatAm' (kaTA0 486) dAnamAnAByAM paryatozayatAm ityarTaH
'aBinandasva gacCeyam' (rA0 41033) aBinandasva aBinanda anumanyasva gamanaM me'nujAnIhItyAha
'samyak praRihitaM cArTaM pfzwaH sannABinandati' (manu0 854) nABinandati na pratipadyate nAByupEti na samADatta iti tu kullUkaH
'yanme baBasti nABinandati' (aTarva0 922) nABinandati na rocate nAhlAdayati
'gAnDarveRa vivAhena bahvyo rAjarzikanyakAH SrUyante pariRItAstAH pitfBiScABinanditAH' (SA0 321).. aBinanditA anumoditakarmARaH
'dvAvapyaBUtAmaBinandyasattvO' (raGu0 531) aBinandyaM stutyaM praSasyam vandyam
'ASIrBiScABindyEtAM jagmurnagarameva hi' (BA0 Adi0 14518) aBinandyABivarDya
'aBinandA vizPuliNgAH' (Sa0 brA0 149116) aBinandAH pramadAnuBUtayaH
'dAhaprapAkO SiSirABinandA DUmAyanaM pittABipanne nayane Bavanti' (suSruta0 2213) aBinando'BilAzaH kAmaH
'pratinandantu pitaraH saMvidAnAH' (hiraRya0 gf0 2144) asmAsu prItAH prasannA BavantvityAha
'nadanti paruzaM SyenAH SivAH kroSanti dAruRam mfgendrAH pratinandanti' (BA0 SAM0 15398) prasIdantItyarTaH tasmAt purastAdvAntam
'sarvAH prajAH pratinandanti' (tE0 brA0 2395) saYcarantaM vAyuM prati hfzyantItyAha
'yAM devAH pratinandanti rAtriM DenumupAyatIm' (aTarva0 3102) pratinandanti stuvanti praSaMsanti
'yaTA vayaH kurUnsarvAn pratinandanti pARqavAH' (BA0 u0 4715) saharzaM satkurvantItyAha
'tatra sTitaH prajAH sarvAH pratinandya visarjayet' (manu0 7146) saMBAzaRadarSanAdiBiH paritozyetyarTaH
'vaDUrviDAtrA pratinandyate sma kalyARI vIraprasavA Baveti' (ku0 787) pratinandyate sma ASizA varDyate sma
'pUjayevaSanaM nityamadyAccEtadakutsayan dfzwvA hfzyet prasIdecca pratinandecca sarvaSaH' (manu0 254).. asmAkaM nityamastvetadityaBiDAya vandanaM pratinandanamiti kullUkaH
'pratinandAma te vAkyaM sarvaM cEva viSAmpate' (BA0 vi0 348) saharzaM svIkurma ityarTaH
'upaDAnena dattena pratyanandad DanaYjayam' (BA0 BIzma0 12046) DanaYjayamASizA'varDayad BIzmaH
'aBivAdya…viprAMSca tESca pratyaBinanditaH' (BA0 anu0 16716) pratyaBinanditaH svAgatavyAhAreRA''sanAdidAnena ca saBAjitaH
'sa tEH parivfto rAjA kaTABiH parinandya tAm' (BA0 ASrama0 193) parinandya raYjayitvA vinodya
